name: Nera – DCMS Age Gate
author: Nera
upgrade_notice: Update for the latest DCMS age verification fixes and WooCommerce compatibility.

sections.description: DCMS Voluntary Code (Clause 1.1) age verification for prize draws — collects and verifies date of birth and blocks anyone under 18 from entering. Requires WooCommerce.
sections.installation: Install and activate WooCommerce, then install and activate this plugin.
